Public transport options, including GSRTC buses, local buses, auto-rickshaws, and cab services, are readily available, making daily travel convenient.

resultList.dtldesc: This sophisticated 3 BHK apartment in Zundal offers a premier residential experience in one of Ahmedabads most rapidly developing corridors. resultList.dtldesc: Property DetailsThis 3 BHK flat is available for sale in Serenity Satyam, South Bopal, Ahmedabad. The apartment is ready to move and offers a spacious and comfortable living environment suitable for families looking for a modern home in a well developed residential area. The property is located on the 13th floor and provides a peaceful atmosphere with good ventilation and natural light. The apartment includes 3 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and 1 balcony designed for comfortable family living.The property is unfurnished which allows buyers to customize the interiors according to their preferences and lifestyle needs. The apartment also includes a spacious living cum dining area that creates a comfortable setting for family gatherings and daily activities. The project offers a balanced lifestyle with modern residential infrastructure and convenient city connectivity.Property SpecificationsThe apartment has a super built up area of 1755 sq ft along with approximately 950 sq ft of carpet area. The flooring is finished with ceramic tiles that provide durability and easy maintenance. The thoughtfully planned layout ensures proper space utilization and smooth movement throughout the apartment.The flat comes with piped gas connection facilities for convenient cooking arrangements. The property is vastu compliant which is considered favorable for peaceful and positive living. Spacious rooms and open balcony areas provide a bright and airy environment suitable for comfortable residential use.FacilitySerenity Satyam offers several modern facilities for comfortable and secure living. The project includes parking space for residents along with 24 hour water supply for uninterrupted daily convenience. Power backup facility is available to ensure continuous electricity supply during outages.Security arrangements include CCTV surveillance and security guard services which help maintain a safe residential environment. Lift facility is also available for convenient access to different floors within the building. The project also includes garden areas that create a peaceful and pleasant atmosphere for residents.LocalitySouth Bopal, Ahmedabad is one of the rapidly developing residential locations known for its modern infrastructure and excellent connectivity. The locality offers convenient access to schools, hospitals, shopping centers, restaurants, banks, and public transportation facilities.The area enjoys good road connectivity to major commercial and residential parts of Ahmedabad, making daily commuting smooth and convenient. South Bopal is highly preferred by families and investors because of its organized development, peaceful surroundings, and availability of modern lifestyle conveniences. Serenity Satyam enjoys a strategic location that provides both residential comfort and urban accessibility.

Gurukul Metro Station is nearby and a bus stop is easily accessible for smooth public transport. With markets schools hospitals and transport options close at hand Memnagar is highly preferred for long term living and investment.

resultList.dtldesc: Situated in the rapidly developing and highly sought-after locality of South Bopal, Ahmedabad, this spacious 3 BHK apartment in Devyana Residency offers an excellent opportunity for families seeking a comfortable and well-connected home in a premium residential neighbourhood. Surrounded by modern conveniences and established social infrastructure, the property enjoys proximity to reputed schools, hospitals, shopping centres, and recreational facilities, making it ideal for contemporary urban living. The nearby Gala Gymkhana further enhances the lifestyle appeal of the location.Property SpecificationsThis ready-to-move apartment spans approximately 202 sq. yrd and is thoughtfully designed to provide spacious and comfortable living for families. The residence comprises 3 generously sized bedrooms, 3 well-appointed bathrooms, and 3 balconies that ensure excellent ventilation and abundant natural light throughout the home. Located on the 5th floor, the apartment offers pleasant open views along with a peaceful and airy ambience.The apartment comes semi-furnished and features a well-designed modular kitchen, providing immediate convenience for residents. The interiors are finished with durable ceramic tile flooring that complements the modern layout while ensuring easy maintenance. The spacious living and dining areas create a warm and welcoming atmosphere suitable for both everyday living and entertaining guests.Being east-facing, the apartment receives ample natural sunlight and maintains good airflow throughout the day. A separate wash area further adds practicality and convenience for household activities. The property also includes covered parking, ensuring safety and convenience for vehicle owners.FacilitiesResidents of Devyana Residency enjoy a comfortable and secure lifestyle with access to several essential amenities. The society offers landscaped garden spaces, lift facility, power backup for common areas, water supply, and well-maintained common infrastructure. The peaceful residential environment and organised society setup make it highly suitable for families seeking a safe and pleasant neighbourhood in Ahmedabad.LocalitySouth Bopal has emerged as one of Ahmedabads preferred residential destinations due to its excellent connectivity and rapidly improving infrastructure. The property enjoys easy access to SP Ring Road, major commercial zones, and BRTS connectivity, with the BRTS station located within walking distance. Reputed schools, hospitals, supermarkets, banks, restaurants, and fitness centres are located within 2 km of the property, ensuring excellent convenience for residents. The localitys balanced mix of residential comfort and urban accessibility continues to attract both end-users and investors seeking long-term value in Ahmedabad.
